diagrams.title: Induction Proof Structure Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows the step-by-step flow of a mathematical induction proof
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the induction proof structure and flow

diagrams.title: Domino Effect Analogy
diagrams.description: Visual representation of how induction works like falling dominoes
diagrams.purpose: Understand why base case and inductive step together prove all cases

diagrams.title: Weak vs Strong Induction Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing difference in assumptions
diagrams.purpose: Differentiate between weak and strong induction approaches

diagrams.title: Recursive Algorithm Proof by Induction
diagrams.description: How induction proves correctness of recursive algorithms
elements: Base case: verify at smallest input
IH: assume correct for smaller inputs
IS: prove correct for current input using IH
diagrams.purpose: Apply induction to algorithm correctness proofs
